event: Abstract surrealist composition with geometric figures
description: An abstract surrealist painting dominated by bold red and blue fields of color. A red-framed doorway or window opens onto a light blue sky. The blue wall features scattered geometric and biomorphic black figures — circular forms with internal abstract patterns, small stick-like creatures, and angular shapes. A railing with triangular patterns divides the lower portion. Small dark figures appear on the grey floor. The composition suggests an interior space opening to an exterior void.
